How do the lipid vacuoles within certain cells affect the nuclear morphology?
Options:
A) They induce nuclear hyperchromasia and uniformity
B) The vacuoles lead to nuclear indentation suggestive of lipoblasts
C) They cause the nuclei to appear smaller and more uniformly round
D) Lipid vacuoles result in an increased nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio
solution: B) The vacuoles lead to nuclear indentation suggestive of lipoblasts
